controls.label: Fractal Type
controls.help: Select the fractal formula. View mapping/camera behavior remain the same across types.

controls.label: Rotation (deg)
controls.help: Optional: engine may ignore

controls.label: Auto-Increment Seed
controls.help: Continuously advances the combined Explaino seed through the existing drift+tween seam.

controls.label: Seed Increment Rate
controls.help: Per-second rate for smooth Explaino seed stepping. Logarithmic scale gives more room in the low end. Left/Right arrow keys also scrub with acceleration.

controls.label: Animate Parameter
controls.help: Select a math parameter to auto-increment each frame. The rate slider below controls the speed.

controls.label: Animation Rate
controls.help: Per-second rate for the selected parameter animation.

controls.label: Multibrot Power
controls.help: Real exponent p in z_{n+1} = z_n^p + c using the principal branch, with 0^p defined as 0 for p > 0.

controls.label: Multicorn Power
controls.help: Integer exponent p in z_{n+1} = conj(z_n)^p + c.

controls.label: McMullen Preset
controls.help: Select the (m, n, lambda) preset for the McMullen rational map z^m + lambda/z^n.

controls.label: Lambda Real
controls.help: Real part of the complex lambda parameter in z_{n+1} = lambda z_n (1 - z_n).

controls.label: Lambda Imag
controls.help: Imaginary part of the complex lambda parameter in z_{n+1} = lambda z_n (1 - z_n).

controls.label: Auto Max Iterations
controls.help: Scale iterations with zoom depth and fractal type

controls.label: Epsilon
controls.help: Convergence threshold

controls.label: Pair Root Family
controls.help: Choose the paired Newton family used by both the baseline and perturbed partner orbits.

controls.label: Perturbation Frame
controls.help: World Absolute keeps the partner offset fixed in the complex plane. View Relative scales the offset with the current zoom.

controls.label: Partner Offset X
controls.help: Real-axis offset applied to the perturbed partner before the paired Newton evolution begins.

controls.label: Partner Offset Y
controls.help: Imaginary-axis offset applied to the perturbed partner before the paired Newton evolution begins.

controls.label: Reconvergence Ratio
controls.help: Class 0 = same-root reconvergence when mean pair gap <= ratio * initial gap. Class 1 = same-basin drift above that ratio. Class 2 = basin swap. Class 3 = unstable.

controls.label: Flow Root Family
controls.help: Choose whether the free Newton step chases the cubic or quartic unit-root family before every radial projection.

controls.label: Projection Radius
controls.help: After each free Newton step, project radially onto the circle |z| = radius. This is the explicit admissible manifold for Projection-and-Flow.

controls.label: Pressure Threshold
controls.help: Classes 0..4N-1 = root sector x transient-pressure band, using the projected orbit's peak radial correction minus its settled correction. Band 0 stays below 25% of the threshold, Band 1 stays in [25%, 50%), Band 2 stays in [50%, 100%), Band 3 saturates at or above the threshold. Class 4N = unstable.

controls.label: Nova Alpha
controls.help: Relaxation factor in z_{n+1} = z_n - a f(z)/f'(z) + c

controls.label: Phoenix p (real)
controls.help: Memory term p in z_{n+1} = z_n^2 + c + p z_{n-1}

controls.label: Transcendental Function
controls.help: Select which transcendental function to apply Newton's method to.

controls.label: Explaino Seed
controls.help: Primary Explaino seed control. The host splits this combined value into the integer seed base and fractional drift.

controls.label: Explaino Seed B
controls.help: Secondary Explaino seed for DualSeed root-pack blending.

controls.label: Explaino Mix
controls.help: Blend between the primary Explaino seed surface and the secondary seed surface.

controls.label: Root Spread
controls.help: Controls the radius of generated root placements, independent of warp distortion.

controls.label: Phase Strength
controls.help: Multiplier on phase modulation of root angles. Higher values make the Phase slider more influential.

controls.label: Newton Damping
controls.help: Multiplier on the Newton step size. Values <1 slow convergence for richer structure; >1 can overshoot.

controls.label: Cluster Radius
controls.help: Distance between paired near-coincident roots. Smaller values produce near-degenerate polynomials that expose solver failure geometry.

controls.label: Momentum Beta
controls.help: Signed strength of previous-step momentum. Positive values carry the prior-step direction forward; negative values push against it.

controls.label: Joy Coupling (gamma)
controls.help: Blends Newton on P with Newton on P'. At 0, pure Newton on P(z). Higher values couple the derivative-level root-finding step P'/P''.

controls.label: Fold Coupling (alpha)
controls.help: Controls abs-value folding of the Newton step. At 0, pure Newton. Higher values fold Step components through absolute value (Burning Ship style).

controls.label: Bell Coupling (beta)
controls.help: Controls measurement-reaction decomposition. At 0, pure Newton. Higher values suppress the measurement channel (P-phase parallel component), letting only the reaction (perpendicular) component drive the step.

controls.label: Ripple Amplitude
controls.help: Controls standing-wave perturbation strength. At 0, pure Newton. Higher values add sinusoidal kicks perpendicular to the Newton step, creating Chladni-figure interference rings at basin boundaries.

controls.label: Splice Offset
controls.help: Controls the seed offset for the second polynomial. At 0, both polynomials match (pure Newton). Higher values increase the difference between alternating polynomials, creating Moire-like interference patterns.

controls.label: Vortex Strength
controls.help: Controls the self-referential spin intensity. At 0, iteration is pure Newton. Higher values rotate each Newton step by an angle proportional to its own direction, creating spiral interference.

controls.label: Tension Strength
controls.help: Controls the pull toward the second-closest root. At 0, pure Newton. Small values fatten basin boundaries into structured contested territories.

controls.label: Balance Void
controls.help: Pulls the Explaino flow toward the midpoint between the two nearest roots. At 0, the family collapses exactly back to baseline Explaino.

controls.label: Symmetry Tension
controls.help: Pulls the active orbit toward or away from the symmetry line shared by the two nearest roots. Zero keeps the baseline Explaino step untouched.

controls.label: Field Curvature
controls.help: Bends the local flow around the root midpoint void. Zero preserves the original Explaino field; signed values curve it clockwise or counterclockwise.

controls.label: Explaino Seed Fraction
controls.help: Advanced fractional component of the combined Explaino seed. Usually edit Explaino Seed instead.

controls.label: Coloring Mode
controls.help: Keep the main Color panel on the legacy runtime coloring seam. Use Color Pipeline... for advanced composition once the descriptor-driven editor is enabled.

controls.label: Grading
controls.help: Grading remains public while advanced pipeline editing is staged behind the Color Pipeline window.

controls.label: Device
controls.help: Optional: engine clamps to available devices
